title: Phase 3 – Risk Classification Schema
description: Validates the payload for EU AI Act risk tier classification.

system_name.description: Name of the AI system being classified

use_case.description: Intended use case of the AI system

deployment_context.description: Context in which the system is deployed

processes_biometric_data.description: Whether the system processes biometric data

used_in_critical_infra.description: Whether the system is used in critical infrastructure

affects_access_to_services.description: Whether the system affects access to essential services

autonomous_decision.description: Whether the system makes autonomous decisions without human review
